sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50544" key="i)ceutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰξ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n50544.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of an</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰξευτής</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.19</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ Ἰ.</foreign>, title of lost poem by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> </bibl>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.139</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
